---
title: "cmass_reference_displacement_grid"
generated: true
description: "Alias for displacement_from_reference_grid."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.coords`](../nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cmass_reference_displacement_grid -->
`cmass_reference_displacement_grid` is an alias for [`displacement_from_reference_grid`](displacement_from_reference_grid.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
